speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: ’Tis certain he hath passed the river Somme.

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: An if he be not fought withal, my lord,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Let us not live in France. Let us quit all,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: And give our vineyards to a barbarous people.

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Ô Dieu vivant, shall a few sprays of us,

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: The emptying of our fathers’ luxury,

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Our scions, put in wild and savage stock,

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Spurt up so suddenly into the clouds

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: And overlook their grafters?

speaker: BRITTANY
text: Normans, but bastard Normans, Norman bastards!

speaker: BRITTANY
text: Mort de ma vie, if they march along

speaker: BRITTANY
text: Unfought withal, but I will sell my dukedom

speaker: BRITTANY
text: To buy a slobb’ry and a dirty farm

speaker: BRITTANY
text: In that nook-shotten isle of Albion.

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Dieu de batailles, where have they this mettle?

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Is not their climate foggy, raw, and dull,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: On whom, as in despite, the sun looks pale,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Killing their fruit with frowns? Can sodden water,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: A drench for sur-reined jades, their barley broth,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Decoct their cold blood to such valiant heat?

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: And shall our quick blood, spirited with wine,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Seem frosty? O, for honor of our land,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Let us not hang like roping icicles

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Upon our houses’ thatch, whiles a more frosty people

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Sweat drops of gallant youth in our rich fields!

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: “Poor” we may call them in their native lords.

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: By faith and honor,

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Our madams mock at us and plainly say

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Our mettle is bred out, and they will give

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Their bodies to the lust of English youth

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: To new-store France with bastard warriors.

speaker: BRITTANY
text: They bid us to the English dancing-schools,

speaker: BRITTANY
text: And teach lavoltas high, and swift corantos,

speaker: BRITTANY
text: Saying our grace is only in our heels

speaker: BRITTANY
text: And that we are most lofty runaways.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Where is Montjoy the herald? Speed him hence.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Let him greet England with our sharp defiance.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Up, princes, and, with spirit of honor edged

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: More sharper than your swords, hie to the field:

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Charles Delabreth, High Constable of France;

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: You Dukes of Orléans, Bourbon, and of Berri,

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Alençon, Brabant, Bar, and Burgundy;

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Jacques Chatillon, Rambures, Vaudemont,

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Beaumont, Grandpré, Roussi, and Faulconbridge,

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Foix, Lestrale, Bouciquault, and Charolois;

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: High dukes, great princes, barons, lords, and knights,

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: For your great seats now quit you of great shames.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Bar Harry England, that sweeps through our land

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: With pennons painted in the blood of Harfleur.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Rush on his host, as doth the melted snow

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Upon the valleys, whose low vassal seat

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: The Alps doth spit and void his rheum upon.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Go down upon him—you have power enough—

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: And in a captive chariot into Rouen

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Bring him our prisoner.

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: This becomes the great!

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: Sorry am I his numbers are so few,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: His soldiers sick and famished in their march,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: For, I am sure, when he shall see our army,

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: He’ll drop his heart into the sink of fear

speaker: CONSTABLE
text: And for achievement offer us his ransom.

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Therefore, Lord Constable, haste on Montjoy,

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: And let him say to England that we send

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: To know what willing ransom he will give.—

speaker:
KING
               
              OF
               
              FRANCE
text: Prince Dauphin, you shall stay with us in Rouen.

speaker: DAUPHIN
text: Not so, I do beseech your Majesty.

speaker: KING
text: Be patient, for you shall remain with us.—

speaker: KING
text: Now forth, Lord Constable and princes all,

speaker: KING
text: And quickly bring us word of England’s fall.
